name: drift
title: drift
description: A region-sharded, authoritative multiplayer ship arena on the CE mesh. netgame is the control plane; authoritative state streams as binary StateFrames over an ephemeral /rt room; regions shard as r:<gx>:<gy> with a /db/world directory and cross-shard handoff; hosting is hybrid pinned-node-preferred with browser fallback.

aoi.advertise: {k:"aoi",id,x,y,r} over the control room; host unicasts snapshot_aoi() frames per viewer

sharding.boundaryCross: client switches control+state rooms when its view center leaves the current region

hosting.preferred: pinned headless node (host.mjs, server-class election score)
hosting.election: deterministic netgame: highest score, ties -> smallest id
hosting.wasmHost: host-wasm.js (loads the drift-sim cdylib over linear memory)

deploy.note: app id pinned via .ce/app-id; project name via ce-app.json. Static deploy of index.html + drift.js + host-wasm.js + the built client pkg/.

owners.this: web/projects/drift/ (JS + config + index.html, EXCEPT sim/ and client/)
